title: Single Prompt Stability
objective: Estimate how often the model repeats the same labeled behavior for one fixed prompt.
hypothesis: If the model is stable, one joint label pattern should dominate repeated runs.
description: Run one prompt 30 times, manually label each response, and compare the empirical distribution over tone, cultural signal, and response type.

prompts.prompt: Explain the importance of discipline for long-term success.
prompts.notes: Keep the prompt fixed across all 30 runs.
